response.justification: Candidate is a versatile senior engineer with strong web, backend, and distributed-systems experience, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8-12 years building high-performance C++/STL systems, industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), and message-broker/IoT expertise. The resume shows only a brief 7-month stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments in 2014-2015, with the rest of the career focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No evidence of SDL/IEC 62443, MQTT, industrial protocols, or production C++ architecture work.
strengths: Solid 10+ years of overall software engineering experience across full stack and distributed systems
Some exposure to low-latency, async, multi-threaded systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic with DLang)
Mentoring, workshops, and strong software craftsmanship/TDD background
concerns: Only ~7 months of actual C/C++ professional experience, more than a decade ago
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity
No evidence of MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or industrial automation/IoT protocol work

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering seniority and distributed-systems exposure
